poster_title: EvoAgentX: An Automated Framework for Evolving Agentic Workflows
authors: Yingxu Wang, Siwei Liu, Jinyuan Fang, Zaiqiao Meng
paper_info: Proceedings of the 2025 Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing: System Demonstrations, pages 643–655, November 4-9, 2025

content: Multi-agent systems (MAS) are powerful for orchestrating large language models (LLMs) and specialized tools.
MAS have been widely deployed in multi-hop QA, software engineering, code generation, and dialogue systems.
Existing MAS frameworks often require manual workflow configuration and lack dynamic evolution support.
Manual efforts are required to define roles, task decomposition, agent interactions, and workflow configurations.
Most existing MAS frameworks lack mechanisms for dynamic workflow evolution or optimization.
Optimization methods are fragmented and not integrated into unified platforms.
EvoAgentX automates the generation, execution, and evolutionary optimization of multi-agent workflows.
Modular architecture with five core layers: basic components, agent, workflow, evolving, and evaluation.
Integrates three optimization algorithms: TextGrad, AFlow, and MIPRO.
panels.figure_caption: The framework of EvoAgentX. It illustrates the modular architecture including the basic components.

content: EvoAgentX evaluated on HotPotQA, MBPP, MATH, and GAIA benchmarks.
Assessed on real-world tasks using the GAIA benchmark.
7.44% increase in HotPotQA F1 score.
10.00% improvement in MBPP pass@1.
10.00% gain in MATH solve accuracy.
Up to 20.00% overall accuracy improvement on GAIA.
panels.figure_caption: Performance improvements of Open Deep Research and OWL Agent on the GAIA benchmark.

content: EvoAgentX consistently improves performance through dynamic workflow evolution.
The platform's modular architecture and optimization techniques support diverse applications.
Built-in benchmarks and standardized evaluation metrics facilitate consistent performance improvements.
EvoAgentX significantly enhances multi-agent system performance through automated and evolutionary workflow optimization.
Modular architecture and advanced optimization techniques make it a valuable tool for various applications.
